name: calibre-mcp
description: FastMCP 3.1+ Calibre library MCP: portmanteau tools, metadata/chunk RAG, FTS, viewer, skills.

calibre_library_path.title: Calibre library path
calibre_library_path.description: Folder containing Calibre metadata.db and book files

timeout.title: Operation timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Default timeout for long Calibre operations

tools.name: manage_libraries
tools.description: List/switch libraries, connection test, multi-library stats

tools.name: query_books
tools.description: Search and list books (portmanteau: title, author, tags, filters, auto_open)

tools.name: search_fulltext
tools.description: Calibre FTS full-text search; optional phrase locations (PDF/EPUB)

tools.name: calibre_metadata_search
tools.description: Semantic search over title, authors, tags, comments

tools.name: calibre_rag
tools.description: Portmanteau: neural media / full-text RAG over Calibre content

tools.name: media_critical_reception
tools.description: Critical reception style analysis for media items

tools.name: media_deep_research
tools.description: Deep multi-step research over library media context

tools.name: manage_metadata
tools.description: Book metadata show/edit and extended fields

tools.name: manage_viewer
tools.description: Open books in viewer, random open, format selection

tools.name: help_tool
tools.description: Interactive help for tools and sampling
